flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bellin College rose 42% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.8k → $31.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bellin College rose 42% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.8k → $31.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bellin College rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.0k → $18.0k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bellin College are 37% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($76.2k vs $55.7k).
